name: Rand Paul
subject: top 10 things that make Obama unqualified for office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot- Yesterday, the Obama White House had the nerve to say someone else was unqualified for office. After 7 years of acting like a King and ignoring our constitution, that takes a lot of nerve. **Today I would like to put a mirror in front of the Obama White House and show them the top ten things that make HIM unqualified:** 1\. Tried to take over 1/6 of the economy in Obamacare, wrecked the system and hurt patients and taxpayers. 2\. Thinks an executive order is legislation and how you make law. 3\. Fought an undeclared, unconstitutional war in Libya, turned it into a Jihadist wonderland. 4\. Fighting an undeclared, unconstitutional war in Syria, trying to put ISIS in Damascus. 5\. Signed into law the indefinite detention of American citizens 6\. His copy of the bill of rights obviously goes from 1 to 3, skipping the 2nd Amendment. 7\. Court ruled his NSA spying on every American was illegal. 8\. He has added more debt than anyone in history. 9\. Appointed an attorney general who thinks speech against Muslims is a bigger threat than terrorism. 10\. EPA rules by executive FIAT trying to kill an entire American industry and way of life (coal). All of these policies are ridiculous, reckless, and they've hurt America. Obama's support of these actions disqualifies him as a leader, and **anyone who stands by this list, Democrat or Republican, should be disqualified as well.** America doesn't need another Obama in the White House. Peter,

I'd like to share something special with you today.

We just released our new TV ad set to air in Iowa and South Carolina. It's called "These Hands."

Unlike a lot of political ads you see on TV, ours doesn't attack anyone. It is positive and focuses on what makes our nation great -- the American people. I'm very proud of it.

[**I hope you will take 60 seconds to go here and watch it right now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150599:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150599:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r)
---
[**Once you're done watching, I humbly ask you to make a donation of any amount so we can keep it running on television.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150599:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r)

There's only one way to combat the biased and unfair attacks we've endured from the media and that is to take our message directly to the people. With the first votes right around the corner, this is when I will need your help the most. This is what we've been working towards.

**Here's what your contribution today will directly fund:**
* [**$25 gets our ad**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150600:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r) on stations in Cedar Rapids, Iowa.
* [**$50 will play this ad**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150601:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r) during daytime viewing in South Carolina.
* [**$100 will help us to play this ad**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150602:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r) during local nightly news in Des Moines where the opinion leaders count.
* [**$250 will allow us to play this ad**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150603:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r) on prime-time programming across New Hampshire reaching 3.2 people per household.
* [**$1,000 will play this ad**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150604:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r) on FOX News during _The Kelly File_ and _The O'Reilly Factor_ , reaching millions of viewers.

[**So please, take just 60 seconds to watch our new TV ad right now, and make a donation to help us keep it on the air.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32150599:sUXPUwyNX:m:1:876315805:7336909B4EEB96BFEE0431B8E2B40760:r)

Thank you for standing with me, and I hope I can count on your support today.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

body:

\- December 08 2015 -
Trump Maintains Dominance

| Dear Peter Willis, I want to thank you for your incredible support. The latest polls are a testament to your enthusiasm and my vision to make our country better than it has ever been. According to the latest poll by [Reuters](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-j/), we have 35% support, giving us more than a 19% lead ahead of our closest rival.The Iowa Caucus is less than 60 days away and according to the latest [CNN/ORC poll](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-t/), we have a commanding thirteen point lead in Iowa, with 33% support. I will be returning to Iowa on Friday for a [rally in Des Moines](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-i/) and I hope to see you there.In New Hampshire, according to a newly-released [CNN/WMUR poll](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-d/), we are dominating with 32% support and my closest rival trails with only 14%. I will be in New Hampshire on Thursday night to meet with the New England Police Benevolent Association-- I have enormous respect for these brave men and women.In North Carolina, the latest [PPP](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-h/) poll finds me "at [my] highest level of support in the state yet," with 33% of the vote. I was in North Carolina last week for a rally in Raleigh, which more than 8,000 people attended. It was a terrific event and I look forward to visiting again soon. Additionally, a [USA Today/Suffolk University](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-k/) poll shows that I am ahead by 10 points among Republicans. Thank you for your passion and commitment to my campaign. We look forward to continued success this week in [Des Moines, Iowa](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-u/) on Friday, [Aiken, South Carolina](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-o/) on Saturday, and [Las Vegas, Nevada](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-vliwty-drdiuiutjh-b/) next week. With your continued to support, we will Make America Great Again!
---

Donald J. Trump

body:
Dear Patriot, **$2 million. ** It's a lot of money. But that's what some of my opponents are budgeting for state filing fees, signature gathering and delegate recruitment to ensure their names get on the ballot in all 50 states! Of course, I know they'd love to ensure my name never appears . . . **They 'd love it if the ONE candidate's name who's committed to fighting for liberty and limited government never appeared as a choice before the American people!** [Patriot, that's why I'm counting on you to help put my name on the ballot in all 50 states with your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32153791:sFcwsvyNy:m:1:879035888:FC9BE637D531D4E5970CD2C9739E67FB:r). The good news is, while other candidates have to pay high-cost political pros to do this work for them because their stale Big Government messages don't excite anyone, grassroots patriots all over the country are spending long hours volunteering for my campaign. That means we should be able to complete this task for just a fraction of the cost of other campaigns. Of course, we still have to come up with the resources to pay exorbitant state filing fees - which can be as much as $40,000 in South Carolina. So my campaign has set a [$750,000 goal](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32153792:sFcwsvyNy:m:1:879035888:FC9BE637D531D4E5970CD2C9739E67FB:r) for this critical project. **Sadly, we don't have much time.** **But I know we can meet this challenge if every one of my supporters is willing to chip in even a little**. name: Martese Johnson for Bernie 2016
subject: All the police saw was a young black male with a high-top fade
body:
#
Dear Friend,
Earlier this year, I was violently slammed to the ground by three police officers near my college campus at the University of Virginia. At that moment I had no freedom, no autonomy and no say in what was happening to me. Many others who have been in a situation like mine did not live to tell the tale.
My encounter with police that night left me with cuts, bruises, and gashes -- including a head injury that took 10 stitches to close. Why was I subjected to such violence when so many other students in similar circumstances were left alone?
**It is way past time that we confront the epidemic of police brutality in this country which disproportionately affects people of color.** Bernie Sanders released a racial justice plan which will do this, and more.
[**Click here to say you support Bernie's plan to address the structural inequalities and institutional barriers faced by people of color.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2920/43f17890/4c15b72c/6217d33d/3120616093/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/racial-justice?source=em151209full")
Growing up on the South Side of Chicago, I know firsthand how law enforcement officials treat black people and members of low-income communities. When the officers stopped me in Charlottesville, they did not see a University of Virginia student out with his peers. They saw a young black male with a high-top fade, a gold chain, some tennis shoes, and a hoodie.
I grew up with the belief that education and success would be my sanctuary. **But there are no suits I can wear, words I can say, or achievements I can earn that will eliminate the centuries of fear and propaganda that have told this nation and the world that people who look like me are inherently a threat.**
Yet I am determined to be the first in my family to graduate successfully from a four-year university, and I believe that this generation of Americans can take proactive steps in our communities to create a country that is safe and welcoming towards all people.
Bernie's racial justice plan is based on the five types of violence waged against people of color: physical, political, legal, economic and environmental. [**Add your name to stand with Bernie and support his racial justice plan.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2920/43f17890/4c15b72c/6217d33d/3120616093/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/racial-justice?source=em151209full")
* **Physical violence in the form of police brutality and racist acts of terrorism must come to an end.** We should look closely at how and whom we recruit to become law enforcement officers, while also maintaining positive and transparent relations between police departments and the communities they serve.

* **The political disenfranchisement of people of color through voter suppression and lost voting rights is unacceptable.** We must restore voting rights for those who have served time in prison, as well as make it easier to vote by declaring Election Day a federal holiday and automatically registering citizens to vote when they turn 18.

* **Legal violence against people of color is perpetuated by implicit bias, an unfair criminal justice system and a for-profit prison system.** Some steps we can take include eliminating mandatory minimum sentences, investing in resources to medical and mental health interventions for those with substance abuse issues, and creating opportunities for formerly incarcerated people to find work and reintegrate into society after they have served their time.

* **The stark levels of income and wealth inequality are evidence of the economic violence that many experience each day.** We must grant all people the ability to support their families and make ends meet. Bernie's plan will do this by supporting pay equity for women, tuition-free public universities, and a federally-funded jobs program to grant employment opportunities to young people of color.

* **Lastly, it is communities of color that are all too often exposed to the harmful effects of pollution and climate change.** We must advance environmental justice by creating renewable energy systems, adopting cleaner manufacturing processes, and ensuring that all people can live in areas that are not contaminated by chemicals, pesticides or other toxins.

Bernie's racial justice plan is a crucial step towards confronting the structural inequalities that still exist in our country. As long as innocent civilians continue to be abused or murdered at the hands of police, we must strive to do better.
While I am one of many people who have become victims of police brutality, it is important that we acknowledge the many other ways in which people of color experience discrimination each day. By adopting Bernie's comprehensive approach to achieving racial justice, we can create a society where all people are treated with dignity and respect.
[**Add your name today to say you support Bernie's racial justice plan.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2920/43f17890/4c15b72c/6217d33d/3120616093/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/racial-justice?source=em151209full")
Thank you for standing with Bernie on this important issue.
Martese Johnson

subject: Trump's fundraiser

body:
---
Friend --

I'll cut right to the chase: Donald Trump is headlining a big fundraiser this weekend, the money from which will **directly benefit** Republican Pat Toomey's reelection campaign.

Trump's appalling recent remarks about banning Muslims from entering the country join a long list of egregious statements he's made about our country and our values. He represents the worst of America, and apparently Pat Toomey is joining him for the ride.

[**I 've called on Pat Toomey to cancel this fundraiser and refuse to accept a dime of money that is raised from Donald Trump's dangerous rhetoric. Join me and add your name here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-234725833946693632/-1528388232817934336?ms=20151209&refcode=e20151209&refcode2=e20151209&amount=15)

| **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-234725833946693632/-1528388232817934336?ms=20151209&refcode=e20151209&refcode2=e20151209&amount=15)**
---

Pat Toomey has told the media that he has a "scheduling conflict" and won't be able to attend the fundraiser, but we know that he's just trying to pull a fast one. The truth is that **Pat Toomey knows how toxic Trump 's rhetoric and beliefs are, and he doesn't want to be seen in the same room as him.** That won't stop him from taking the money Trump helps raise though.

**[ADD YOUR NAME and join me in calling on Pat Toomey to REJECT Donald Trump's hatred and cancel this fundraiser immediately.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-234725833946693632/-1528388232817934336?ms=20151209&refcode=e20151209&refcode2=e20151209&amount=15)**

There is no question that the invitation to Donald Trump falls squarely on Toomey's shoulders -- either he should cancel this fundraiser or he should accept that he owns Trump's hateful speech and every dollar that is raised from it.

Katie

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Elizabeth Warren's plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

America should not be the kind of place where seniors and veterans have to forgo buying groceries or medicine because they can't afford it.

**But that could very well be the case if the Social Security Administration goes through with its plan to deny seniors and veterans a cost-of-living benefits increase.**

It will be only the third time since 1975 that seniors and veterans are denied an increase. We have to do better than this, and we can.

**Rep. Tammy Duckworth and I are working on a version of Sen. Elizabeth Warren 's SAVE Benefits measure that would provide each senior with $581 more in 2016 -- a little less than $50 a month.**

It might not seem like much, but $581 could cover the cost of groceries for three months or the out-of-pocket cost of prescription drugs. It could be the difference that pulls seniors or veterans out of poverty.

[**Seniors and veterans deserve to be able to afford living essentials. Stand with Sen. Warren, Rep. Duckworth and I to demand that Congress increase Social Security benefits to keep up with the cost of living.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21e7/738133e4/3bc64eda/7f8371b7/3680051920/VEsH/ "http://action.tammyduckworth.com/page/signup/save?source=patrickmurphy_save")

Our seniors have paid into Social Security for their entire lives -- and in the case of veterans, many have also risked their lives to protect our country. Providing Social Security payments that keep up with the cost of living is following through on a promise.

In 2016, the costs of core goods and services is expected to rise by about 2%. For seniors who already straddle the poverty line and who rely on Social Security for a majority of their income, this failure to keep benefits on pace with the cost of living will be devastating.

[**This is important, and Rep. Duckworth and I need your help. Sign your name and make sure seniors and veterans get what they 're owed. Tell Congress to pass the SAVE Benefits Act.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21e7/738133e4/3bc64eda/7f8371b7/3680051920/VEsE/ "http://action.tammyduckworth.com/page/signup/save?source=patrickmurphy_save")

Thank you,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21e7/738133e4/3bc64eda/7f8371b0/3680051920/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
